authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. This receipt records their source-bound composition and does not convert the V3 constitution into a theorem derivation.

composition.candidate_domain: The two unique V2 canonical Protein forms: alpha state 201 and beta state 117.
composition.selection_order: The admitted V3 sequence-only dimensionless topology ordering, deterministic tie break, and counted 24-path capacity, unchanged.
composition.propagation: The engine-closed colour window has three residues, the orientation quartet has four, and each advances by the One.

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V2 closure receipt plus the admitted V3 constitution are hash-bound below.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: Both and only both unique V2 forms are enumerated at every C-alpha-active residue; the engine closes 2^3 = 8 window paths and 2^4 = 16 quartet paths.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: The composition contains exactly the closed candidate domain, the existing V3 order, target-incapable geometry, and seal-before-comparison protocol; it adds no scoring or selection relation.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: All six V2 sign/angle candidate counts equal one and the V34 runtime deterministically replays one path under the registered V3 ordering.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Selector input is exactly run_id and sequence; target access exists only in the separate post-seal evaluator.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python admission checks halt on domain, overlap, source, import, configuration, or deterministic-replay drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before runtime promotion; recorded separately after the sealed 76-residue development execution and post-seal measurement.
